curriculum.title: Linear Systems
curriculum.summary: Solve systems from equations, tables, and word constraints.

curriculum.title: Exponents and Surds
curriculum.summary: Exponent laws, radicals, and square-root structure.

curriculum.title: Inequalities and Absolute Value
curriculum.summary: Solve and reason about intervals and distance on a line.

curriculum.title: Geometry and Similarity
curriculum.summary: Angle chase, similar triangles, and scale relationships.

curriculum.title: Circles and Coordinate Geometry
curriculum.summary: Circle facts, chords, distance, and slope ideas.

curriculum.title: Counting and Probability
curriculum.summary: Casework, permutations, combinations, and event probability.

curriculum.title: Functions and Graphs
curriculum.summary: Interpret linear and quadratic relationships from graphs and tables.

curriculum.title: Sequences and Series
curriculum.summary: Arithmetic and geometric progressions with contest twists.

curriculum.title: Number Theory and Modular Reasoning
curriculum.summary: Remainders, divisibility, parity, and modular shortcuts.

curriculum.title: Algebra Word Models
curriculum.summary: Translate word conditions into equations and solve efficiently.

curriculum.title: Optimization and Logic
curriculum.summary: Extremes, invariants, and strategy-heavy contest problems.
